limitations: Original visuals are rendered from saved HTML fragments plus the harvested original CSS, not a new live original-app browser session.
Current repo screenshots include the named e2e screenshot artifacts plus Playwright failure screenshots from the latest run when present.
Cards with no current screenshot are source/code-evidence only until fresh role-specific screenshots are captured.
Hidden modals/fragments are force-shown for inspection; that is marked as inspection rendering, not native runtime state.

mappings.name: Room Shell / Full Layout
mappings.correct: Angular room shell uses top fixed Bootstrap nav, left room sidebar, angular-split/as-split areas, alerts/chat pane, and presentation area in one dense work UI.
mappings.ours: Svelte room shell exists and has the same broad regions, but current screenshots/code use custom CSS/grid/button markup instead of the reference Bootstrap/as-split DOM.
mappings.confidence: Strong for section existence and broad layout; exact parity must be validated live after code changes.

mappings.name: Top Navbar / Volume / Reload
mappings.correct: Bootstrap navbar with mainAppNav, hamburger/sidebar menu, user/mobile indicators, dropdownVolume, volume slider, sound toggles, and fa-sync reload nav item.
mappings.ours: RoomTopNav component exists, but evidence points to a custom topbar implementation and likely different dropdown/nav-link/button structure.
mappings.confidence: Strong for original structure from isolated nav fragments and capture JSON; current visual is from existing repo screenshot, not fresh live run.

mappings.name: Sidebar / Roster / Admin Controls
mappings.correct: Reference sidebar is Bootstrap nav list with Mobile App Info, Connectivity Check, General Settings, Archives, muted/followed users, active room users, sort/search/user option buttons, and role-gated controls.
mappings.ours: Sidebar/member panel exists, but evidence needs live admin/presenter/member captures for exact gated controls and roster geometry.
mappings.confidence: Medium: original evidence is strong, current-state parity needs fresh role-specific screenshots.

mappings.name: Presentation Tabs / Screens / Streams / Notes / Files
mappings.correct: Bootstrap nav-tabs list with Screens, hidden Streams in some captures, Notes with noteChangeIndicator/edit icon, Files with folder icon, and note sub-tabs including home/pen badges.
mappings.ours: Existing repo screenshots include Streams/Notes/Files states, but source inspection previously showed some tab assumptions were stale. This must be checked against current code before calling it fixed.
mappings.confidence: Strong for original tab markup; medium for repo because screenshots may be stale.

mappings.name: Alerts Panel / Alert Rows / Posting Flow
mappings.correct: Reference alerts feed is read-only for rows; posting is routed through Post Alert modal. Rows use dense Bootstrap message bubbles, QA/reaction/menu affordances, and row menu actions.
mappings.ours: Our screenshots show Post Alert flow and row menu, but code must be checked for any leftover inline composer or non-reference row/menu chrome.
mappings.confidence: Strong for correct flow; current parity depends on code read/live screenshot.

mappings.name: Post Alert Modal
mappings.correct: Bootstrap modal #alert-modal with Text Alert, Text Url, combined Image / GIF / Video tab, textarea, URL input group, upload label/drop zone, footer checkboxes, green Post Alert.
mappings.ours: Current screenshot shows a Post Alert modal, but first-pass evidence was too narrow; the deeper card compares the original single saved modal directly against current screenshot and component path.

mappings.name: Poll Window / Poll Panel
mappings.correct: Reference is a floating draggable poll panel with titlebar controls, Create New Poll and Pre-Canned Polls tabs, step labels, Add Choice, Save To Canned, and Send Poll.
mappings.ours: Current screenshot shows a poll create surface; compare carefully for floating titlebar chrome, canned tab, and Save To Canned before calling it matched.
mappings.confidence: Strong for original, medium for current screenshot freshness.

mappings.name: User Settings Modal
mappings.correct: Bootstrap modal #user-settings-modal with App Settings, Alert Settings, Chat Settings tabs, radio/checkbox groups for color theme, layout, chat color mode, sound toggles, and chat text size number input.
mappings.ours: No current repo screenshot artifact found for this modal. Must use code inspection or generate fresh screenshot before visual parity claim.
mappings.confidence: Strong original, weak current visual until captured.

mappings.name: Audio/Video Settings Modal
mappings.correct: Bootstrap AV settings modal with User Settings and Presenter Settings tabs, speaker output selector/test, presenter mic/cam selectors, and Save/Close footer.
mappings.ours: No current repo screenshot artifact found. Current implementation needs visual capture for exact tab/nav/form/footer parity.
mappings.confidence: Strong original, weak current visual until captured.

mappings.name: Advanced Search / Alert Filter / Scheduled Alerts
mappings.correct: Reference uses Bootstrap modal chrome. Advanced Search has title Rooms refresh button, dropdown-menu multi-selects, text search, checkbox filters, datetime fields. Scheduled Alerts is modal-xl table Date/Time, Sender, Alert, Repeat, Actions.
mappings.ours: No local screenshot artifact for these surfaces; existing docs say these are high-risk until visual capture confirms dropdown/table structure.
mappings.confidence: Strong original, weak current visual until captured.

mappings.name: Session / Logs / Reports Admin Modals
mappings.correct: Reference admin modals use Bootstrap modal hierarchy, title-specific ids, modal headers/footers, list groups/tables/loading states, and role-gated visibility.
mappings.ours: Session screenshots exist; logs/reports/all-PM need fresh current visual capture before claiming exact match.
mappings.confidence: Medium: original modal shells are strong; some bodies are async/empty in captures.

mappings.name: Chat / Private Chat / Reply / QA
mappings.correct: Reference chat/PM/reply surfaces use dense Bootstrap message rows, textareas with image/GIF/emoji affordances, private chat docked panel, followed/muted user modals, and Q&A modal shell.
mappings.ours: Current chat screenshots cover basic chat/reactions only; private/reply/QA/followed/muted need dedicated current visuals.

mappings.name: Media / YouTube / Mobile App / Screen Share / Recording
mappings.correct: Reference includes Play YouTube For All modal, mobile app modal with store badges, draggable/resizable screen-share and rec preview cards, WebRTC troubleshooter rows, rich text editor shell, toast container, and hidden webcam audio sink.
mappings.ours: Some media screenshots exist; screen-share/recording/toast/audio sink/mobile/settings require current visual or code evidence before exact parity claims.
